basic_details.job_title: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 07 July 2026 on the official website b-u.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Project Assistant post through the Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 Years Age relaxation is applicable upto 5 Yrs. As per the Tamil Nadu Government Norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Botany or equivalent / life sciences with a minimum of 55% marks
qualification.details: M.Sc. Botany or equivalent / life sciences with a minimum of 55% marks.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.bharathiar_university: M.Sc. Botany or equivalent / life sciences with a minimum of 55% marks

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Bharathiar University Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. Botany or equivalent / life sciences with a minimum of 55% marks.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 Years Age relaxation is applicable upto 5 Yrs. As per the Tamil Nadu Government Norms.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at Bharathiar University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Project Assistant position at Bharathiar University is 18-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Botany or an equivalent degree in life sciences with a minimum of 55% marks to be eligible for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant position is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided as per Tamil Nadu Government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position is a contractual job role at Bharathiar University.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Bharathiar University located?
faq.answer: Bharathiar University is located in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 641046.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
